topic_title: Vladimir Putin proposes Gerhard Schröder as mediator for Ukraine negotiations
topic_summary: The Russian president suggested the former German chancellor as a preferred negotiator for the conflict in Ukraine. The proposal was met with mixed reactions, including a rejection from the German government and criticism from EU officials who labeled the suggestion cynical.

findings.title: EU Ministers to Discuss Possibility of Direct Talks With Russia
findings.summary: Vladimir Putin has proposed German Chancellor Gerhard Schröder as a possible negotiator in talks with the European Union.
findings.text: EU Ministers to Discuss Possibility of Direct Talks With Russia | Vladimir Putin has proposed German Chancellor Gerhard Schröder as a possible negotiator in talks with the European Union.

findings.title: Ukraine firmly rejects Schröder as EU negotiator – FM Sybiha
findings.summary: Kyiv does not support the candidacy of former German Chancellor Gerhard Schröder as a potential negotiator for the European Union, a proposal reportedly put forward by Russia.
findings.text: Ukraine firmly rejects Schröder as EU negotiator – FM Sybiha | Kyiv does not support the candidacy of former German Chancellor Gerhard Schröder as a potential negotiator for the European Union, a proposal reportedly put forward by Russia.

findings.title: Russia has no right to appoint EU negotiator – Kallas
findings.summary: Former German Chancellor Gerhard Schröder is a well-known lobbyist for Russian companies, so it is not surprising that Vladimir Putin would like him to serve as the European Union’s negotiator.
findings.text: Russia has no right to appoint EU negotiator – Kallas | Former German Chancellor Gerhard Schröder is a well-known lobbyist for Russian companies, so it is not surprising that Vladimir Putin would like him to serve as the European Union’s negotiator.

findings.title: EU’s Kallas criticises Putin’s ‘very cynical’ Ukraine ceasefire calls and rejects suggestion of Schröder as mediator – Europe live
findings.summary: EU’s foreign policy chief and the ex-Estonian PM dismiss Putin’s suggestion that former German chancellor could coordinate talksMeanwhile, Poland’s former justice minister Zbigniew Ziobro, wanted by Polish authorities with allegations of over 20 criminal charges, moved to the US over the weekend, leaving Hungary where he held political asylum granted by the previous government of Viktor Orbán.Ziobro was one of the most prominent faces of the PiS government and played a central role in its con...

findings.title: Could German ex-leader really negotiate Ukraine peace?
findings.summary: Former German chancellor Gerhard Schröder is a controversial — and some critics would even say, unserious — choice as a negotiator on the Ukraine war. He's long been criticized for being too close to Russia.
findings.text: Could German ex-leader really negotiate Ukraine peace? | Former German chancellor Gerhard Schröder is a controversial — and some critics would even say, unserious — choice as a negotiator on the Ukraine war. He's long been criticized for being too close to Russia.

findings.title: 'No comment' after Schröder named by Putin for Ukraine talks
findings.summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin suggested that the former German chancellor serve as a mediator in Russia-Ukraine peace talks.
findings.text: 'No comment' after Schröder named by Putin for Ukraine talks | Russian President Vladimir Putin suggested that the former German chancellor serve as a mediator in Russia-Ukraine peace talks.

findings.title: Putin schlägt Schröder als Vermittler vor - die Reaktionen sind gemischt
findings.summary: Sie verbindet eine jahrelange Freundschaft - nun will Kreml-Chef Putin Altkanzler Schröder als Vermittler im Krieg gegen die Ukraine haben. Reaktionen aus der deutschen Politik folgen schnell.
findings.text: Putin schlägt Schröder als Vermittler vor - die Reaktionen sind gemischt | Sie verbindet eine jahrelange Freundschaft - nun will Kreml-Chef Putin Altkanzler Schröder als Vermittler im Krieg gegen die Ukraine haben. Reaktionen aus der deutschen Politik folgen schnell.

findings.title: Путин назвал «предпочтительным переговорщиком» по Украине бывшего канцлера ФРГ Шредера. В правительстве Германии это предложение отвергли
findings.summary: В правительстве Германии отвергли предложение Владимира Путина о том, чтобы посредником между Россией и Украиной выступил бывший канцлер ФРГ Герхард Шредер, сообщают Reuters, Süddeutsche Zeitung, Spiegel и другие немецкие СМИ со ссылкой на источники.
findings.text: Путин назвал «предпочтительным переговорщиком» по Украине бывшего канцлера ФРГ Шредера. В правительстве Германии это предложение отвергли | В правительстве Германии отвергли предложение Владимира Путина о том, чтобы посредником между Россией и Украиной выступил бывший канцлер ФРГ Герхард Шредер, сообщают Reuters, Süddeutsche Zeitung, Spiegel и другие немецкие СМИ со ссылкой на источники.

findings.title: Александр Сокуров не выступил на Венецианской биеннале. Против его участия высказались в открытом письме российские активисты. Среди подписантов — Павел Таланкин и Саша Скочиленко, которую режиссер поддерживал в суде. Дискуссия не утихает уже несколько дней. Главные реакции
findings.summary: Выступление Александра Сокурова на Венецианской биеннале не состоялось. Российский режиссер был приглашен на конференцию «Инакомыслие и мир», но, как сообщили в пресс-службе биеннале, не смог принять участие «из-за внезапной недоступности». Накануне биеннале с открытым письмом к руководству выставки обратились российские и итальянские деятели культуры и активисты. Они назвали «имитацией» цикл закрытых дискуссий «Инакомыслие и мир», куда пригласили Сокурова, и высказались против участия режисс...

Они назвали «имитацией» цикл закрытых дискуссий «Инакомыслие и мир», куда пригласили Сокурова, и высказались против участия режисс...

findings.title: EU, Ukraine reject Germany's ex-Chancellor Schroeder as peace talks mediator
findings.summary: Kaja Kallas noted that Gerhard Schroeder has worked as "a high-level lobbyist for Russian state-owned companies," and that it is clear why Vladimir Putin "wants him" as the mediator.
findings.text: EU, Ukraine reject Germany's ex-Chancellor Schroeder as peace talks mediator | Kaja Kallas noted that Gerhard Schroeder has worked as "a high-level lobbyist for Russian state-owned companies," and that it is clear why Vladimir Putin "wants him" as the mediator.

findings.title: Ukraine to 'respond in kind' if Russia refrains from mass aerial attacks, Zelensky says
findings.summary: "As for our long-range sanctions, yesterday and today, Ukraine refrained from long-range actions in response to the absence of massive Russian attacks. Going forward, we will respond in kind," President Volodymyr Zelensky said.
findings.text: Ukraine to 'respond in kind' if Russia refrains from mass aerial attacks, Zelensky says | "As for our long-range sanctions, yesterday and today, Ukraine refrained from long-range actions in response to the absence of massive Russian attacks. Going forward, we will respond in kind," President Volodymyr Zelensky said.

findings.title: Germany skeptical of Putin's proposal to make Schroeder mediator in Ukraine peace talks, media reports
findings.summary: A German official, speaking on condition of anonymity, told Reuters that the proposal was not credible because Russia had not changed its conditions for ending the war.
findings.text: Germany skeptical of Putin's proposal to make Schroeder mediator in Ukraine peace talks, media reports | A German official, speaking on condition of anonymity, told Reuters that the proposal was not credible because Russia had not changed its conditions for ending the war.

findings.title: EU’s Kallas rejects Gerhard Schröder as Russia-Ukraine negotiator
findings.summary: Russian leader Vladimir Putin has said he would like the ex-German chancellor to negotiate on Europe's behalf.
findings.text: EU’s Kallas rejects Gerhard Schröder as Russia-Ukraine negotiator | Russian leader Vladimir Putin has said he would like the ex-German chancellor to negotiate on Europe's behalf.
